# Weekly Shopping List

## Groceries
- Milk (2L)
- Bread (whole wheat)
- Eggs (12 pack)
- Chicken breast
- Rice (basmati)
- Olive oil
- Tomatoes
- Onions
- Garlic

## Household
- Dish soap
- Paper towels
- Laundry detergent

## Notes
Remember to check for discounts on chicken at the local market.
The organic eggs from the farm are worth the extra cost.
